flags.label: Public associate's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Lake Michigan College are 8% below the public associate's-predominant peer median ($34.5k vs $37.4k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Lake Michigan College rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($6.9k → $7.8k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Lake Michigan College rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($4.9k → $5.4k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Lake Michigan College fell 11% between 2021 and 2024 (2.4k → 2.1k).
